title: Tencent Cloud Launches CodeBuddy NPC: From Code Assistant to End-to-End Self-Developed AI Agent
excerpt: On July 23, Tencent Cloud officially launched the new cloud-based R&D AI agent CodeBuddy NPC. As a major upgrade product of the CodeBuddy code assistant for ent
content_html:
On July 23, Tencent Cloud officially launched the new cloud-based R&D AI agent CodeBuddy NPC. As a major upgrade product of the CodeBuddy code assistant for enterprise R&D scenarios, this AI agent deeply relies on the Tencent Cloud CNB R&D platform and natively integrates Issue, code repository, PR, and CI/CD process data, achieving end-to-end self-developed R&D in the cloud.

Different from traditional on-premises AI coding tools, developers only need to issue task instructions in the ticket, and CodeBuddy NPC can independently complete the entire workflow, including solution planning, coding development, submitting PRs, and automated testing, and can self-iterate and fix errors based on CI run results.

In addition, the product supports orchestrating multi-role collaborative NPC Teams, enabling division of labor in project management, content creation, asset integration, and code reviews. In terms of computing costs, through optimizing prompts, tool calls, and cache hit rates, the official CodeBuddy NPC has reduced the first-round Token consumption by more than 90% (from over 20,000 to about 2,000), and supports flexible model switching according to task difficulty.

As AI coding tools evolve from simple code generation to intelligent agents with autonomous planning and execution capabilities, the release of CodeBuddy NPC marks that the enterprise-level AI R&D ecosystem has entered a stage of deep engineering collaboration. It significantly reduces the cost of large model applications while promoting the comprehensive intelligent reconstruction of cloud-native R&D workflows.

In terms of computing costs, through optimizing prompts, tool calls, and cache hit rates, the official CodeBuddy NPC has reduced the first-round Token consumption by more than 90% (from over 20,000 to about 2,000), and supports flexible model switching according to task difficulty.

sentences.en: In terms of computing costs, through optimizing prompts, tool calls, and cache hit rates, the official CodeBuddy NPC has reduced the first-round Token consumption by more than 90% (from over 20,000 to about 2,000), and supports flexible model switching according to task difficulty.

content_html_zh:
7月23日，腾讯云正式上线全新云端研发AI代理CodeBuddy NPC。 作为CodeBuddy代码助手面向企业研发场景的重大升级产品，该AI智能体深度依托腾讯云CNB研发平台，原生集成Issue、代码库、PR、CI/CD流程数据，实现端到端的云端自研研发。

与传统的本地AI编码工具不同，开发人员只需在工单中下达任务指令，CodeBuddy NPC就可以独立完成整个工作流程，包括解决方案规划、编码开发、提交PR和自动化测试，并可以根据CI运行结果进行自我迭代和修复错误。

此外，该产品还支持编排多角色协同NPC Team，实现项目管理、内容创作、资产整合、代码审核等方面的分工。 计算成本方面，通过优化提示、工具调用、缓存命中率，CodeBuddy NPC官方将首轮Token消耗降低了90%以上（从2万多减少到2000左右），并支持根据任务难度灵活切换模型。

随着AI编码工具从简单的代码生成演变为具有自主规划和执行能力的智能代理，CodeBuddy NPC的发布标志着企业级AI研发生态进入了深度工程协作阶段。 显着降低大模型应用成本，同时推动云原生研发流程全面智能重构。
